user_query: We need a 10-day, rail-first Austria trip plan in July for a mixed-age family and a smooth end in Munich. Please read input/trip_request.json and input/constraints.md for our exact flights, travelers, and preferences. Then: 1) Confirm our Schengen entry path and passport validity timing first; 2) Lock season logic for mid-July (summer lakes + easy alpine views), then design a corridor-based route that keeps us to max 3 bases and favors Vienna → Salzburg → Innsbruck/Tyrol on the westbound rail corridor; 3) Include one relaxed Wachau day, a lake day in Salzkammergut without Hallstatt crunch, and an easy Innsbruck-area lift day with low-mobility options; 4) Default to rail for all intercity legs, but include a clearly separated car variant only for lake/rural segments if it truly improves the plan; 5) Build a day-by-day plan with transfer windows, weather-sensitive items and backups, reservation deadlines (key trains, lifts, hotels), a realistic mid-range budget, safety and emergency notes, and payment/tipping guidance. We arrive Vienna morning July 12 and depart Munich early afternoon July 21; please buffer the last night appropriately. Deliverables: - output/itinerary.json: a machine-readable export with at least these top-level keys: {"entry": {"passport","schengen_days_total","visa_path_locked","passport_validity_checked"}, "season": {"month","season_type"}, "corridor", "base_cities" (array including Vienna and Salzburg, plus Innsbruck or a Tyrol valley), "day_by_day" (10 items, each with {"day","base","activities" (array), optional "transfer_window", and any weather-sensitive flags}), "transport": {"rail_first": true, "intercity_legs": [...], "car_variant": {"enabled": true/false, "when_to_use", "estimated_costs"}}, "reservations": {"deadlines": [...]}, "airport_transfers": {"arrival","departure"}, "departure_buffer": true/false, "weather_backups": [...], "budget": {"rail_tickets","local_transit_passes","car_costs","tolls_parking_vignette","mountain_lifts","hotels","meals_misc"}, "safety": {"emergency_numbers": [...], "mountain_risk"}, "payment": {"cards","cash","tipping"}, "rubric_notes": {"pace_logic","accessibility_considerations","why_rail_first"}}; - output/itinerary.md: a human-friendly operational brief that clearly labels: Base-city strategy; Day-by-day with transfer windows; Weather-sensitive items and backups; Reservation deadlines; Rail-first plan vs. optional car variant; Budget overview; Safety, payment, and emergency notes. Please write only to output/ paths.
